zh.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets於1560年出生。他於1581年7月31日與Mary Baker結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾史達科特 奧 阿沃
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets于1560年出生。他于1581年7月31日与Mary Baker结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tibbets
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Tibbetts  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tibbetts
meanings: English (Staffordshire): variant of Tebbutt , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets was born in 1560. He married Mary Baker on 31 July 1581. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets est né en 1560. Il a épousé Mary Baker le 31 juillet 1581. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets wurde 1560 geboren. Er hat am 31. Juli 1581 Mary Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets è nato il nel 1560. Lui sposato Mary Baker il 31 luglio 1581. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.Stratford on Avon, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアストラトフォード オン アボン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbetsは1560年に生まれた。1581年7月31日にMary Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets(은)는 1560년 태어났다. 그는 1581년 7월 31일 Mary Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets nasceu em 1560. Ele casou-se com Mary Baker em 31 de julho de 1581. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets родился в 1560 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Baker 31 июля 1581 г. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Nicholas Tibbets nació en 1560. Se casó con Mary Baker el 31 de julio de 1581. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 4 hijas.
